def negative_text_bytes_boundary_relies_on_implicit_default_encoding():
    rule_id = "text_bytes_boundary_relies_on_implicit_default_encoding"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag code that crosses text and bytes boundaries without an explicit encoding contract."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
